description: Adds 'Open ConEmu Here' (normal + admin) to the Windows right-click context menu.

messages.scriptDisabled: ConEmu context menu script is disabled in config.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.conemuNotFound: '{command}' not found on PATH -- searching known locations...
messages.noExeFound: No ConEmu executable found. Install ConEmu first via 'install conemu' (script 48).

messages.regBg: Creating context menu entry for FOLDER BACKGROUND...
messages.runasSet: HasLUAShield set -- UAC prompt will appear
messages.done: All ConEmu context menu entries created successfully!
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.

messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Registry entries removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove registry entries + tracking
